description.value: Aura moderate evocation; CL 8th; Slot none; Price 18,950 gp; Weight 5 lbs. DESCRIPTION Crafted from bronzewood with brass bindings, this staff allows use of the following spells: Burning hands (1 charge) Fireball (2 charges) Wall of fire (3 charges) CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Craft Staff; Spells burning hands, fireball, wall of fire; Cost 9,475 gp.
